rawAssistant: This is a hard one to pin down. The old keeper of this place would tell you that it's been quiet for years, ever since... Well, not exactly 'years', but after the Storms passed through Hollowfen. You know how it is with these new wardstones – they can be quite temperamental. Some folks say it's just a matter of time before another disturbance sets off the beacon once more. I've been studying the flood records and wardstone resonance patterns, trying to make sense of it all... Still, there's something about this particular beacon that doesn't add up.
